welcome.title: Calculate Your Runway
welcome.description: Find out how long you can survive on your savings. Takes just 60 seconds!

savings.title: What's your current savings?
savings.description: Total amount you have available right now

expenses.title: What do you spend per month?
expenses.description: Rough estimate is fine! Include rent, food, bills, etc.

situation.title: Choose your situation
situation.privacy: 🔒 Data is stored on your device only

freelancer.title: Freelancer
freelancer.description: I want to manage irregular income and predict my runway

job-seeker.title: Job Seeker
job-seeker.description: I want to know how long I can last on a limited budget

startup.title: Entrepreneur
startup.description: I want to check my runway before burning out

quick.title: Quick Calculate
quick.description: I just want a simple runway estimate

step2.title: What are your current assets?
step2.label: Total assets (bank + savings + cash)
step2.hint: Include only cash you can use immediately

step3.title: What's your average monthly spending?
step3.label: Monthly average expenses
step3.recentIncome: Enter your income for the last 3 months
